label: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 11

extraction.one_line_summary: GROVES Kaden won the sprint after bike positioning chaos on the 3.6km arrow-straight approach favored teams who delayed deployment.
tactical_patterns: PEDERSEN Mads dominated intermediate sprint unopposed with BENNETT Sam absent, making green jersey mathematically safer mid-race.
Bike Exchange pivoted from GC loss (YATES Simon COVID) to sprint train dominance same-day, unusual tactical flexibility.
UAE brought MOLANO Juan Sebastián instead of ACKERMANN Pascal, signaling sprint leadership uncertainty despite flat finish.
VAN POPPEL Danny nearly won without leading out BENNETT Sam, revealing Deceuninck sprint depth when primary asset absent.

rider_signals.GROVES Kaden: positive: Repaid full leadout on 3.6km straight despite multiple top sprinters positioned, shows he converts organized support
rider_signals.PEDERSEN Mads: positive: Fifth in pure sprint while extending green jersey gap shows he's racing classification not stages
rider_signals.MERLIER Tim: neutral: Third place as reigning Belgian champion suggests positioning limits rather than raw speed deficit
rider_signals.DEGENKOLB John: neutral: Went first but faded, indicating he lacks sustainable top-end speed for 3km+ drag sprints
rider_signals.YATES Simon: negative: COVID withdrawal mid-Vuelta ended GC campaign, forced Bike Exchange total strategic pivot
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: negative: Shoulder injury crash continues brutal return-from-injury season for world champion
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: neutral: 2:41 GC lead unchanged but losing SERRY Pieter and ALAPHILIPPE Julian thins mountain support pre-critical stages
